mapper.select:
SELECT FNCN_BSNS_PBAN_NO ,FNCN_BSNS_PBAN_TTL_NM ,FNCN_BSNS_PBAN_DCD ,FNCN_BSNS_NM ,PBAN_YMD ,PRDO_RCCG_YMD ,RSPB_EMN ,RPRS_CNPL_CON ,PBAN_DTL_CON ,FILE_UNQ_NO ,DEL_YN ,RGSR_NM ,TO_TIMESTAMP(IIBS_FRRG_TS) as IIBS_FRRG_TS ,IIBS_FRRG_ID FROM TB_BOX_IVT_IVB001_M WHERE 1=1
AND FNCN_BSNS_PBAN_DCD = #{selectFncnBsnsPbanDcd}
AND RGSR_NM LIKE '%' || #{searchRgsrNm} || '%'
AND FNCN_BSNS_PBAN_NO LIKE '%' || #{searchFncnBsnsPbanNo} || '%'
AND FNCN_BSNS_PBAN_TTL_NM LIKE '%' || #{searchFncnBsnsPbanTtlNm} || '%'
AND RGSR_NM LIKE '%' || #{searchRgsrNm} || '%'
AND FNCN_BSNS_PBAN_NO LIKE '%' || #{searchFncnBsnsPbanNo} || '%'
AND FNCN_BSNS_PBAN_TTL_NM LIKE '%' || #{searchFncnBsnsPbanTtlNm} || '%'
ORDER BY IIBS_FRRG_TS DESC

SELECT FNCN_BSNS_PBAN_NO ,FNCN_BSNS_PBAN_TTL_NM ,FNCN_BSNS_PBAN_DCD ,FNCN_BSNS_NM ,TO_CHAR(TO_DATE(PBAN_YMD,'YYYYMMDD'),'YYYY-MM-DD') AS PBAN_YMD ,TO_CHAR(TO_DATE(PRDO_RCCG_YMD,'YYYYMMDD'),'YYYY-MM-DD') AS PRDO_RCCG_YMD ,RSPB_EMN ,RPRS_CNPL_CON ,PBAN_DTL_CON ,FILE_UNQ_NO ,DEL_YN ,RGSR_NM ,TO_TIMESTAMP(IIBS_FRRG_TS) as IIBS_FRRG_TS ,IIBS_FRRG_ID FROM TB_BOX_IVT_IVB001_M ORDER BY IIBS_FRRG_TS DESC

SELECT FNCN_BSNS_PBAN_NO ,FNCN_BSNS_PBAN_TTL_NM ,FNCN_BSNS_PBAN_DCD ,FNCN_BSNS_NM ,PBAN_YMD ,PRDO_RCCG_YMD ,RSPB_EMN ,RPRS_CNPL_CON ,PBAN_DTL_CON ,FILE_UNQ_NO ,DEL_YN ,RGSR_NM ,TO_TIMESTAMP(IIBS_FRRG_TS) as IIBS_FRRG_TS ,IIBS_FRRG_ID FROM TB_BOX_IVT_IVB001_M WHERE FNCN_BSNS_PBAN_NO = #{fncnId} AND PBAN_YMD IS NOT NULL AND PRDO_RCCG_YMD IS NOT NULL

SELECT ivb_003.FNCN_BSNS_PBAN_NO ,ivb_003.FNCN_BSNS_ENLS_FILD_UQN ,ivb_003.RGSN_SQN ,ivb_003.ORCY_FNCN_AMT ,ivb_003.FNCN_BSNS_CHC_OPCM_CNT ,TO_TIMESTAMP(ivb_003.IIBS_FRRG_TS) as IIBS_FRRG_TS ,ivb_003.IIBS_FRRG_ID ,ccd.COM_CD_NM as FNCN_BSNS_ENLS_FILD_UQN_NM FROM TB_BOX_IVT_IVB003_M ivb_003 LEFT JOIN TB_BOX_IVT_COM_CD_D ccd ON ivb_003.FNCN_BSNS_ENLS_FILD_UQN = SUBSTRING(ccd.COM_CD_ID,5) WHERE FNCN_BSNS_PBAN_NO = #{fncnId} AND ccd.GRP_CD_ID IN ('FBN00') ORDER BY ivb_003.RGSN_SQN ASC
SELECT COUNT(*)+1 AS FNCN_BSNS_PBAN_NO FROM TB_BOX_IVT_IVB001_M

SELECT ivb101.FNCN_BSNS_RCIP_NO ,ivb101.FNCN_BSNS_PBAN_NO ,ivb101.FNCN_BSNS_ENLS_FILD_UQN ,ivb101.FNCN_BSNS_PGRS_SCD ,ivb101.OPCM_NM ,ivb001.FNCN_BSNS_PBAN_TTL_NM ,TO_TIMESTAMP(ivb101.IIBS_FRRG_TS) as IIBS_FRRG_TS ,ivb101.IIBS_FRRG_ID FROM TB_BOX_IVT_IVB101_M as ivb101 LEFT JOIN TB_BOX_IVT_IVB001_M as ivb001 ON ivb101.FNCN_BSNS_PBAN_NO = ivb001.FNCN_BSNS_PBAN_NO WHERE ivb101.FNCN_BSNS_PGRS_SCD IN ('2','3','4','5')
AND ivb101.FNCN_BSNS_PGRS_SCD = #{selectFncnBsnsPgrsScd}
AND ivb101.OPCM_NM LIKE '%' || #{searchOpcmNm} || '%'
AND ivb101.FNCN_BSNS_RCIP_NO LIKE '%' || #{searchFncnBsnsRcipNo} || '%'
AND FNCN_BSNS_PBAN_TTL_NM LIKE '%' || #{searchFncnBsnsRcipTtlNm} || '%'
AND ivb101.OPCM_NM LIKE '%' || #{searchOpcmNm} || '%'
AND ivb101.FNCN_BSNS_RCIP_NO LIKE '%' || #{searchFncnBsnsRcipNo} || '%'
AND FNCN_BSNS_PBAN_TTL_NM LIKE '%' || #{searchFncnBsnsRcipTtlNm} || '%'
ORDER BY IIBS_FRRG_TS DESC

SELECT ivb101.FNCN_BSNS_RCIP_NO ,ivb101.FNCN_BSNS_ENLS_FILD_UQN ,ivb101.FNCN_BSNS_PGRS_SCD ,ivb001.FNCN_BSNS_PBAN_TTL_NM ,ivb001.PBAN_YMD ,ivb101.OPCM_NM ,ivb101.OPCM_RPPR_NM ,ivb101.OPCM_INCR_YMD ,ivb101.OPCM_LICS_KCD ,ivb101.OPCM_BZN ,ivb101.OPCM_RSPR_NM ,ivb101.OPCM_CNPL_CON ,ivb101.OPCM_EAD ,ivb101.JNT_OPCM_YN ,ivb101.SPRN_FILD ,ivb101.FUND_NM ,ivb101.FNCN_BSNS_CPRT_DCD ,ivb101.IBK_FNCN_RQST_AMT ,ivb101.FUND_ORGZ_SCDL_AMT ,ivb101.FUND_ASCE_TRM ,ivb101.FNMN_PMNT_MCD ,ivb101.BASE_ENRT_CON ,ivb101.MNRM_CON ,ivb101.OTCM_RMNR_CON ,ivb101.RMRK_CON ,ivb101.FILE_UNQ_NO ,TO_TIMESTAMP(ivb101.IIBS_FRRG_TS) as IIBS_FRRG_TS ,ivb101.IIBS_FRRG_ID ,ivb001.FNCN_BSNS_PBAN_NO ,ivb001.FNCN_BSNS_PBAN_TTL_NM ,ivb001.PBAN_YMD ,ccd.COM_CD_NM as FNCN_BSNS_ENLS_FILD_UQN_NM FROM TB_BOX_IVT_IVB101_M as ivb101 LEFT JOIN TB_BOX_IVT_IVB001_M as ivb001 ON ivb101.FNCN_BSNS_PBAN_NO = ivb001.FNCN_BSNS_PBAN_NO LEFT JOIN TB_BOX_IVT_COM_CD_D ccd ON ivb101.FNCN_BSNS_ENLS_FILD_UQN = SUBSTRING(ccd.COM_CD_ID,5) WHERE ivb101.FNCN_BSNS_RCIP_NO = #{fncnId} AND ccd.GRP_CD_ID IN ('FBN00')

SELECT FNCN_BSNS_RCIP_NO ,RGSN_SQN ,OPCM_NM ,OPCM_RPPR_NM ,OPCM_INCR_YMD ,OPCM_BZN ,OPCM_RSPR_NM ,CNPL_CON ,EML_CON ,IIBS_FRRG_TS ,IIBS_FRRG_ID FROM TB_BOX_IVT_IVB102_L WHERE FNCN_BSNS_RCIP_NO = #{fncnId}

SELECT FNCN_BSNS_RCIP_NO ,RGSN_SQN ,OPCM_NM ,OPCM_HMRS_DCD ,OPCM_HMRS_NM ,OPCM_HMRS_CRR_NYY ,OPCM_CMPN_TPN ,OPCM_RSPR_CPN ,OPCM_EAD ,TO_TIMESTAMP(IIBS_FRRG_TS) as IIBS_FRRG_TS ,IIBS_FRRG_ID FROM TB_BOX_IVT_IVB105_M WHERE FNCN_BSNS_RCIP_NO = #{fncnId}
SELECT FNCN_BSNS_RCIP_NO ,RGSN_SQN ,OPCM_NM ,ISNC_INTT_NM ,PGST_CON ,FNCN_AMT ,TO_TIMESTAMP(IIBS_FRRG_TS) as IIBS_FRRG_TS ,IIBS_FRRG_ID FROM TB_BOX_IVT_IVB106_L WHERE FNCN_BSNS_RCIP_NO = #{fncnId}
SELECT FNCN_BSNS_RCIP_NO ,RGSN_SQN ,FNCN_BSNS_PMGL_CON ,TO_TIMESTAMP(IIBS_FRRG_TS) as IIBS_FRRG_TS ,IIBS_FRRG_ID FROM TB_BOX_IVT_IVB103_L WHERE FNCN_BSNS_RCIP_NO = #{fncnId}

SELECT FNCN_BSNS_RCIP_NO ,RGSN_SQN ,FNCN_BSNS_CHC_PRNL_ITM_NM ,FNCN_BSNS_CHC_PRNL_CON ,TO_TIMESTAMP(IIBS_FRRG_TS) as IIBS_FRRG_TS ,IIBS_FRRG_ID FROM TB_BOX_IVT_IVB104_L WHERE FNCN_BSNS_RCIP_NO = #{fncnId}

SELECT ivb101.FNCN_BSNS_RCIP_NO ,ivb101.FNCN_BSNS_PBAN_NO ,ivb101.FNCN_BSNS_ENLS_FILD_UQN ,ivb101.FNCN_BSNS_PGRS_SCD ,ivb101.OPCM_NM ,ivb001.FNCN_BSNS_PBAN_TTL_NM ,TO_TIMESTAMP(ivb101.IIBS_FRRG_TS) as IIBS_FRRG_TS ,ivb101.IIBS_FRRG_ID ,ccd.COM_CD_NM as FNCN_BSNS_ENLS_FILD_UQN_NM FROM TB_BOX_IVT_IVB101_M as ivb101 LEFT JOIN TB_BOX_IVT_IVB001_M as ivb001 ON ivb101.FNCN_BSNS_PBAN_NO = ivb001.FNCN_BSNS_PBAN_NO LEFT JOIN TB_BOX_IVT_COM_CD_D ccd ON ivb101.FNCN_BSNS_ENLS_FILD_UQN = SUBSTRING(ccd.COM_CD_ID,5) WHERE ivb101.FNCN_BSNS_PGRS_SCD IN ('2','3','4','5') AND ccd.GRP_CD_ID IN ('FBN00') ORDER BY IIBS_FRRG_TS DESC
SELECT COM_CD_ID, GRP_CD_ID, COM_CD_NM, COM_CD_DESC, LNP_SQN, USE_YN, RGSN_USER_ID, RGSN_TS FROM TB_BOX_IVT_COM_CD_D WHERE GRP_CD_ID IN (#{grpId}) AND USE_YN = 'Y' ORDER BY LNP_SQN ASC
mapper.update: UPDATE TB_BOX_IVT_COM_CD_D SET USE_YN = 'N' ,AMNN_USER_ID = #{amnnUserId} ,AMNN_TS = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE COM_CD_ID = #{comCdId}
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*)+1 AS COM_CD_ID FROM TB_BOX_IVT_COM_CD_D WHERE GRP_CD_ID IN (#{grpId})
